name: Spryker
description: Composable commerce PaaS with modules & APIs for B2B/B2C/marketplace.

seo.title: Spryker — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Spryker: Composable commerce PaaS with modules & APIs for B2B/B2C/marketplace.

when_to_use: Composable B2B commerce platform with modular APIs
Marketplace platform built on Spryker's PaaS architecture
Custom storefront on headless Spryker with React frontend
Enterprise e-commerce migrating to composable architecture
Multi-tenant B2C commerce with Spryker module ecosystem

pros: Modular PaaS built for complex B2B
Proven at manufacturing and distributor scale
Good PIM and OMS integration story
review.verdict: Enterprise composable commerce aimed at B2B manufacturers, but pricing rules out everyone below mid-market.
review.best_for: Industrial B2B and marketplace enterprises with dedicated dev teams and partner budgets
review.not_for: SMBs and D2C brands — Shopify Plus or Medusa fit better

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales — no explicit peak-lock evidence
